catalog_csv_row_proposal.Task: Fiscal volatility shocks in a medium-scale New Keynesian model
catalog_csv_row_proposal.Paper: Fiscal volatility shocks and economic activity
catalog_csv_row_proposal.ModelType: Nonlinear DSGE, New Keynesian, fiscal volatility
catalog_csv_row_proposal.KeyFeatures: Distortionary taxes; stochastic fiscal volatility; Rotemberg prices and wages; habit; investment adjustment; variable utilization; government debt

status_csv_row_proposal.paper_title: Fiscal volatility shocks and economic activity
status_csv_row_proposal.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/Fiscal volatility shocks and economic activity.pdf
status_csv_row_proposal.formula_quality: mixed: main model equations readable; wage and investment FOCs need review
status_csv_row_proposal.notes: Online appendix PDF used for household FOCs; .mod used only as implementation_cross_check; Dynare not run.

validation.json_tool: passed: python3 -m json.tool on source_manifest.json and worker_report.json
validation.section_check: passed: English and Chinese derivations contain sections 1 through 8
validation.f_number_count_check: passed: English and Chinese derivations each contain F1 through F26
validation.notes: Dynare was not run. Validation was limited to document, JSON, and whitespace checks.

unresolved_issues: Wage-setting FOC needs source-level PDF review.
Investment FOC needs source-level PDF review.
Growth-normalized steady-state formulas need review before runnable implementation.
Published third-order volatility-shock solution is not validated here.
